name: Speedy Check Cashing
description_short: Speedy Check Cashing offers check cashing and financial services at their Pinellas Park, Florida location. Open Monday–Saturday with extended Friday hours.
description_long: Speedy Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located at 8560 49th St N in Pinellas Park, Florida. The business operates as a traditional financial services provider for customers needing quick access to funds from checks and other transaction services. Based on the available information from their Waze business listing, the company maintains a physical storefront in a commercial area near major retail anchors including Walmart, Target, and Sam's Club, suggesting convenient foot traffic and accessibility for the local community. The company's primary function is to provide check-cashing services, which allow customers to convert checks into cash without requiring a bank account. Their service model caters to unbanked and underbanked consumers who may not have access to traditional banking services or prefer immediate liquidity. Operating hours span late morning through evening on weekdays, with Friday hours extending to 8 PM and Saturday service available until 5 PM, accommodating working individuals. Limited operational data is available from the source material, as the company's presence appears primarily through navigation and directory listings rather than a dedicated corporate website with detailed service descriptions. The business maintains a phone line for customer inquiries at (727) 209-5301. No specific fee structures, service limits, or additional offerings beyond basic check cashing are documented in the available information. Customer testimonials, ratings, or detailed service catalogs are not provided in the source material, limiting comprehensive evaluation of service quality or competitive positioning. The company appears to operate as a straightforward check-cashing establishment without evidence of ancillary financial services or technology platforms.
pros: Extended Friday hours (10 AM–8 PM) accommodate working customers with limited availability
Saturday service (12 PM–5 PM) provides weekend access rare among some financial service providers
Located near major retail destinations (Walmart, Target, Sam's Club) for convenient access
Direct phone line (727) 209-5301 available for customer service and inquiries
Consistent weekday hours (11 AM–7 PM Monday–Thursday) provide reliable accessibility
cons: No dedicated company website available—only directory/navigation listing with minimal service details
No fee structure, service terms, or APR information disclosed in public materials
Limited service description suggests potentially basic offerings without additional financial products
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials available to assess service quality or reliability
Physical location in Pinellas Park limits accessibility for customers outside the immediate area
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals in the Pinellas Park area needing immediate check conversion
Working professionals requiring weekend or extended evening check-cashing access
Customers seeking a nearby physical location within shopping/commercial areas
diagnosis: Speedy Check Cashing is best suited for consumers in the Pinellas Park, Florida area needing quick check-to-cash conversion with flexible hours. The primary caveat is the lack of published fee information, service details, and customer reviews—prospective users should call (727) 209-5301 directly to confirm rates and service terms before using the business.
